nasb.text: I will also put an end to all her gaiety, Her feasts, her new moons, her sabbaths And all her festal assemblies.

esv.text: And I will put an end to all her mirth, her feasts, her new moons, her Sabbaths, and all her appointed feasts.

cnv.text: 我必使她的一切歡樂、 節期、新月、安息日， 或任何盛會都終止。

ccb.text: 我要终止她一切的欢庆， 终止她的年节、朔日、安息日及其他节期。
